allowed_claim_sentence: ClaimBound public materials passed a narrow NLnet funding-fit source audit.
baseline_control_summary: Manual source-boundary check: official NLnet eligibility page + public ClaimBound materials + sanitized mapping summary + forbidden-claim review.
claim_boundary: This card verifies only that ClaimBound public materials can be mapped to selected NLnet eligible activity categories under a frozen manual checklist on the access date. It does not prove NLnet approval, NLnet endorsement, funding likelihood, legal eligibility, reviewer acceptance, or superiority over all manual review.
known_limitations: This is a funding-fit self-check, not a grant decision.
The private submitted NLnet application text is not committed or fully audited in this public card.
The result does not prove NLnet approval, endorsement, legal eligibility or award likelihood.
The mapping may drift if the official NLnet eligibility page changes after the access date.
This is a single-operator manual check and is not independently reproduced.
manual_review: The operator manually checked the official NLnet eligibility page, mapped selected eligible categories to public ClaimBound materials, reviewed forbidden inferences, kept private grant text out of the repository, and accepted only the narrow funding-fit source-audit claim.
official_source_name: NLnet NGI Zero Commons Fund Eligibility information
raw_payload_manifest: official source fetched locally only; local source SHA-256 3e17b458f10d7f25825422b00b3c0625bb75ade865c2b4200b59f05440dd8b5e; byte size 17745; no raw NLnet page or private application text committed
runner_command: Manual checklist using docs/track_families/NLNET_GRANT_FIT_D001_FAMILY_LEDGER.json, artifacts/nlnet_grant_fit_d001_summary.json, local source snapshot in .claimbound_runs/NLNET_GRANT_FIT_D001_2026-06-04, and uv run --extra dev claimbound validate-all
source_rights_note: Official public NLnet eligibility page used for source-boundary evidence only; this card records URL, access date, local hash, sanitized mapping and limitations. Private grant application text is not committed.

visual_summary.allowed_claim_sentence: ClaimBound public materials passed a narrow NLnet funding-fit source audit.
